title: Voygr — AI SaaS Revenue, Funding & Data | IntelPilot.ai
full_text:
Verified Data
💰 Est. Revenue $100K-$500K ARR
“ Based on YC W26 batch (typical $500K investment), several paying customers, and early-stage B2B SaaS metrics with 2-5 person team ”
🚀 Funding $500K+ seed from Y Combinator W26 and SNR VC
🔗 ycombinator.com ↗
📊 Monthly Traffic <5K monthly visits
“ Estimated < 5,000 monthly visits (New startup, site launched late 2025/early 2026). ”
👥 Users Several paying customers
“ Several paying customers (including RepRally and partnerships with Overture Maps). ”
🧑‍💻 Team Size 2-5 employees
“ ~2-5 employees (Founders + early engineering team). ”
📈 Growth Strong early traction in AI-agent place intelligence space
“ Part of YC Winter 2026 batch; strong early traction in AI-agent place intelligence space. ”
🏷️ Stage Seed (YC W26)
📅 Founded 2025
Company Profile
Model B2B SaaS
Vertical AI agents, Enterprise GIS/Mapping, Finance, Logistics
Clients RepRally, Overture Maps
Buyers AI and geospatial engineering teams requiring high-frequency, validated place data
Pricing Enterprise/Developer pricing available upon demo request
Contact
✉️ [email protected] LinkedIn @ VoygrTech
Strategic Analysis
Strategy
Building better maps API infrastructure specifically for AI agents that need real-time, semantic place data. Targeting the gap between static traditional maps and dynamic AI requirements. Land-and-expand model starting with developer teams building AI applications.
Tactics
Leveraging Y Combinator network for early customer acquisition. Partnering with Overture Maps for data validation. Enterprise demo-driven sales process with custom pricing. Focus on developer-first API experience.
Competitive Positioning
Differentiates from traditional maps APIs (Google Maps, Mapbox) by providing real-time, AI-optimized place intelligence rather than static geographic data. Positioned as the semantic layer for location-aware AI applications.
Marketing Approach
YC Demo Day exposure and network effects. Direct outreach to AI/ML engineering teams. Partnership-driven growth through Overture Maps collaboration. Developer community engagement through API documentation and use cases.
Notable
Y Combinator Winter 2026 batch, partnership with Overture Maps
🔗 Source ↗
Tech Stack
AI/LLMs Python Next.js Vercel PostGIS Overture Maps Data Real-time Geospatial APIs
Recent News
Voygr (YC W26) Launches Better Maps API for AI Agents Jan 1, 2026 Voygr officially launched as part of the YC Winter 2026 batch, focusing on real-time place intelligence to solve the staleness of traditional maps APIs. YC W26: The New Guard of AI Infrastructure Feb 1, 2026 Industry analysis highlights Voygr as a key player in the geospatial AI sector, bridging the gap between static map data and semantic AI requirements.
